channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in JavaScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 affaan-m/everything-claude-code (46622 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: affaan-m

📝 Repository: affaan-m/everything-claude-code

📄 Descrizione: Complete Claude Code configuration collection - agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, MCPs. Battle-tested configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner.

⭐ Stelle: 46622

🍴 Forks: 5772

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents anthropic claude claude-code developer-tools llm mcp productivity

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-18T00:51:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-16T04:09:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📜 ComposioHQ/secure-openclaw (1517 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ComposioHQ

📝 Repository: ComposioHQ/secure-openclaw

📄 Descrizione: A personal 24x7 AI assistant like OpenClaw that runs on your messaging platforms. Send a message on WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, or iMessage and get responses from Claude with full tool access, persistent memory, scheduled reminders, and integrations with 500+ apps.

⭐ Stelle: 1517

🍴 Forks: 253

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: clawdbot clawdbot-security moltbot moltbot-skills openclaw openclaw-plugin openclaw-security openclaw-skills openclawd

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-08T07:55:07Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-23T04:08:14Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: accius/openhamclock

📄 Descrizione: "The original HamClock will cease to function in June 2026. OpenHamClock aims to carry on Elwood's legacy with a modern, open-source implementation that the community can maintain and improve together."
